top_signals.title: Citi Says 5.5% May Be Next Focus for 30-Year Treasury Yield
top_signals.summary: Bond traders are zeroing in on 5.5% as the new “round number” for 30-year US Treasury yields as inflation concerns ripple across markets, according to Citigroup Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: High Value Council Tax Surcharge
top_signals.summary: We are seeking views on the design and delivery of the High Value Council Tax Surcharge (HVCTS), a new charge on residential properties worth £2 million and above in England.
